promoted_facts.fact: Great Clips converted from S corporation to C corporation effective January 1, 2019
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass F / Item 21 financial notes

promoted_facts.fact: Average multi-unit ownership: 8 salons per franchisee (5+ years), median 5

Great Clips revenue from all sources (including required purchases) was $115,242,065 in 2024. Note: this differs from total franchise revenue of $202.7M because it represents continuing franchise fee revenue + salon development sales only, excluding Ad Fund pass-through.
14 salons closed and relocated/reopened within fiscal year 2024
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass G / Item 20 Table 3

promoted_facts.fact: 3 of 207 transfers in 2024 were Great Clips exercising right of first refusal
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass G / Item 20 Table 2

promoted_facts.fact: Great Clips registered on Franchise Registry for SBA streamlined lending
Clairol agreement (Dec 12, 1992) restricts use of sailboat motif mark without GREAT CLIPS in conjunction
Operations Manual is 182 pages across 9 sections
Great Clips explicitly prohibits use of confidential information for AI/machine learning without written consent
Punitive damages and jury trial waived in franchise agreement
promoted_facts.source: Contract burden depth pass / Exhibit F Section 16
